While it maintains a robust 35.4 months of working capital, the impact score reflects a medium data confidence level regarding long-term outcome evidence [3].

strengths.detail: The organization demonstrates high efficiency, spending only <cite id="10">$0.07 per $1 raised</cite> to support its operations.
The charity maintains <cite id="11">35.4 months of working capital</cite>, providing a significant safety net for sustained program delivery.
The organization has a <cite id="12">clear Zakat policy</cite> covering multiple asnaf categories, including <cite id="13">muallaf and ibn sabil</cite>.

strengths_deep_dive: The organization's financial health is anchored by its <cite id="14">total assets of $3,028,791</cite> against minimal <cite id="15">liabilities of only $10,930</cite>. This fiscal discipline allows the charity to focus on direct service delivery, which is its primary model for impact. By maintaining <cite id="16">70.5% independent board members</cite>, the organization ensures objective oversight of its <cite id="17">$1.2 million in annual contributions</cite>.
rich_narrative.summary: Icna Chicago Illinois Organization operates as a non-sectarian Islamic hub dedicated to education and youth development through a <cite id="1">transparent, Zakat-eligible financial model</cite>. The organization serves the Chicagoland area with a mission to remain <cite id="2">non-ethnic and open to all</cite>, providing a platform for spiritual and social growth. Financially, the charity reported <cite id="3">total revenue of $1,206,252</cite> in the 2023 tax year, primarily driven by <cite id="4">contributions from the community</cite>. A defining characteristic of the organization is its <cite id="5">70.5% program expense ratio</cite> reported in its baseline financials, indicating that every dollar of revenue is allocated toward its core initiatives. These initiatives include <cite id="6">ICNA Education, Young Muslims (YM), and GainPeace</cite>, which focus on outreach and youth engagement. The organization maintains <cite id="7">strong liquidity with 35.4 months of working capital</cite>, ensuring long-term stability for its regional operations. Furthermore, the charity is <cite id="8">Zakat-eligible</cite>, supporting various categories of recipients including <cite id="9">the poor (fuqara) and needy (masakin)</cite>, as well as those working in the cause of Allah (fi sabilillah).
